---
title: "Wrapping up"
---
::: {.callout-tip collapse=true}
# Learning Goals: Wrapping up
(To be added)
:::

| Date | Topic | Slides | Due |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Tues 12/1 | Frameworks | |[Embick & Poeppel 2014]{.reading}
| Thurs 12/3 | Researcher panel | | [Submit questions](https://www.menti.com/bldf9ra1coas)
| Friday 12/4 || | [Panel reflection]{.due}
| Tues 12/8 | [Presentations]{.controversy} | 
| TBD | [Exam #4]{.exam}
{{< include _includes/legend.qmd >}}
